title: DLRS Entity Graph Edge
description: A single relation in the v0.6 personal knowledge graph (e.g. a 'works at' edge from a person node to an organisation node). Edges are produced alongside nodes by pipelines/knowledge_graph/ (issue #57). The relation field is open-string (not enum) on purpose: the standard set will accumulate over time and we want the schema to accept new relation namespaces without a schema bump. Like nodes and atoms, edges MUST be redaction-safe at write time. v0.6 introduces this schema; the emitter lands in issue #57.

schema_version.description: Version of this schema. Bump on any breaking change.

edge_id.description: Stable identifier for this edge within the owning record. ULID or UUIDv4. MUST be immutable; re-running the pipeline produces a new edge_id.

subject_node_id.description: node_id of the subject (the 'from' side of the relation). MUST refer to an existing node in the same record's graph. Cross-record edges are not permitted by this schema; downstream tooling that needs them should encode them at the registry level.

object_node_id.description: node_id of the object (the 'to' side of the relation).

relation.description: Relation label. Recommended namespace 'dlrs.<verb>' (e.g. 'dlrs.knows', 'dlrs.member_of', 'dlrs.located_in'); custom namespaces 'x_<vendor>.<verb>' are permitted. Free-text relations without a namespace are accepted but consumers MAY downgrade their confidence in such edges.

evidence_pointer.description: Path (relative to the owning record root) of the artefact whose content backs this edge. Typically a derived/text/<stem>.clean.txt or a derived/memory_atoms/<stem>.atoms.jsonl fragment. MUST NOT be an absolute path or external URL.

confidence.description: Confidence the relation is supported by the evidence, in [0, 1].

sensitivity.description: Sensitivity tier inherited from the source record's manifest. Edges MAY NOT be promoted to a less restrictive tier than their source.

redaction_safe.description: Schema-enforced const true. Edges referring to entities whose label / aliases would trigger the v0.5 redaction pass MUST go through that pass before being written.

created_at.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp when the edge was emitted.

pipeline_version.description: Version of the pipeline that emitted the edge. SemVer, or 'git:<sha>'.

audit_event_ref.description: Optional pointer to the audit/events.jsonl line emitted when this edge was written. Format: 'audit/events.jsonl#L<n>'. Populated by the descriptor->audit bridge (issue #58).
